problem id: 18544cb0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00001111 -> 11100011
  10110001 -> 00001100
  10111010 -> 01101110
  01100101 -> 10111001
  11000001 -> 00010000
  11110001 -> 00011100
  11101111 -> 11011011
  01011011 -> 01110110
  00010100 -> 10000101
  00100100 -> 10001001

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 01111000
